narrative:
Precinct Middleton Twp Negley (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,386 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
